overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character moving from a covered alley entrance through a graffiti-covered back alley, emerging onto a sunlit urban street, and entering a neon-lit fashion boutique. The clip ends with the player approaching a mirror in the back of the store, revealing the character's reflection.

agents.ego_description: walking past two conversing NPCs toward the alley exit

woman in red dress standing near the doorway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered alley entrance where two women are standing and conversing. The camera moves forward past them toward a metal shutter door at the end of the walkway, with concrete pillars and dry vegetation visible along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti-covered walls and overgrown weeds

events.description: passing a body lying face-down on the ground in the alley
moving from shadowed alley into bright sunlight approaching the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley passing a body on the ground

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
deceased person lying face-down in the dry grass
tall palm tree visible over the top of the wall
metal security fence topped with barbed wire

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow back alley with high concrete walls covered in graffiti. A body lies on the ground amid overgrown weeds. The path continues past corrugated metal fencing and palm trees, transitioning from shadow to bright sunlight as the street exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with multi-story parking and storefronts

events.description: exiting the narrow alley onto the open city sidewalk
entering the fashion store following an NPC

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and entering the fashion boutique

notable_agents.action: person in purple top and blue pants walking ahead into the store

entered.detail: colorful multi-level parking structure with teal and orange accents
neon sign reading FASHION above the store entrance
traffic signal pole showing green light
futuristic black SUV driving on the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley onto a sunlit urban street, the camera reveals a bustling commercial area with a colorful multi-story parking garage and futuristic vehicles on the road. The player follows a pedestrian in a purple top toward a storefront with a glowing FASHION neon sign and enters the boutique.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk fashion boutique with neon lighting and holographic displays

events.description: holographic price tags appear on mannequins when looking at them
turning toward the back corridor of the store

agents.ego_description: walking through the store examining the merchandise and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: shopper in purple top examining clothes on a display rack

entered.detail: illuminated neon sign with FASHION in orange and teal colors
circular pillar with vertical yellow light strips and digital displays
large advertisement poster for AVANTE brand on the wall
clothing mannequin displaying floating digital price tags

segments.scene_description: Inside the fashion boutique, the scene is bathed in teal and orange neon light. The camera explores the space, passing a holographic display pillar and mannequins with floating digital price tags. An AVANTE brand poster covers the back wall while shoppers browse the clothing racks. The player moves toward the back corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor of fashion store with graffiti and fitting room mirror

events.description: approaching mirror reveals the player character's reflection
character raises a handheld device with glowing blue light while looking in mirror

agents.ego_description: approaching the mirror at the back of the store and observing own reflection

notable_agents.action: player character visible in mirror holding a glowing blue handheld device

entered.detail: graffiti reading //NO.FUTURE on the wall with bullet holes nearby
full-length mirror reflecting the player character
wall with multiple bullet holes surrounding the graffiti

segments.scene_description: Moving into the dimly lit back corridor, the camera approaches a wall with //NO.FUTURE graffiti and bullet holes. A full-length mirror at the end of the hall reveals the player character's reflection as they hold up a glowing device, examining their appearance in the glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed urban alleyway into the vibrant, neon-lit interior of a high-end fashion boutique. It begins at a covered entrance, moving past two conversing women and concrete pillars toward a metal shutter. As the camera pushes through a narrow back alley lined with graffiti and overgrown weeds, the oppressive shadows gradually give way to bright sunlight upon emerging onto a bustling commercial street filled with futuristic vehicles and colorful architecture. The scene then shifts indoors as the camera follows a pedestrian into a boutique bathed in teal and orange neon light, passing holographic displays and digital price tags. Finally, the movement leads into a dimly lit back corridor marked by bullet holes and graffiti, ending as the camera approaches a full-length mirror to reveal the character's reflection.
